assertions.title: Middleware refreshes Supabase session on every request

steps.action: Search src/middleware.ts for session refresh entrypoint
steps.expected: Middleware invokes session refresh on matched requests
steps.observed: Found `const { supabaseResponse, user } = await updateSession(request);` at line 70 and middleware returns `supabaseResponse` across branches.

steps.action: Search src/lib/supabase/middleware.ts for verified user refresh call
steps.expected: Supabase SSR helper calls `supabase.auth.getUser()` after client creation
steps.observed: Found `await supabase.auth.getUser()` at line 48 in updateSession helper.

steps.action: Search middleware/helper files for cookie propagation behavior
steps.expected: Refreshed cookies are propagated to outgoing responses
steps.observed: Found helper cookie callbacks `getAll`/`setAll` and `supabaseResponse.cookies.set(...)` in src/lib/supabase/middleware.ts; found `copySupabaseCookies(...)` used for redirect/401 branches in src/middleware.ts.

summary: VAL-INFRA-004 passed via static shell/search verification: middleware triggers Supabase session refresh via updateSession, updateSession calls supabase.auth.getUser(), and refreshed cookies are propagated through helper callbacks and middleware response cookie copy logic.
